profile_summary: Leisure traveler (tight budget) prioritizing value for money, local culture.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Lumiere, Istanbul ranks #1 for this traveler on value for money (+0.78), local culture (+0.81), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes."

supporting_evidence.quote: On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
Great bang for your buck; you really get a lot for what you pay.
Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Lantern, London ranks #2 for this traveler on value for money (+0.84), local culture (+0.85), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate."

supporting_evidence.quote: Excellent value for the price — far better than I expected for the rate.
Great base for experiencing the real culture — artisans and street food all around.
On-site restaurant was a highlight — beautifully prepared local dishes.
